lesson.menu_title: What Do You Do Every Day?
lesson.menu_desc: Present simple and frequency adverbs for your weekly routine at Sucafina -- 27 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 3 -- Present Simple: Your Everyday Routine at Sucafina
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Carlos Eduardo | Aula 3 -- Present Simple

listenings.text: Here is my week at Sucafina. On Mondays, I check the farm checklists. I verify supplier compliance every month, and I always report the results to my manager. I often attend alignment meetings with the Rwanda team on Zoom. I sometimes send documents to the Switzerland office. I do not write long documents in English alone yet, but I try every day. My manager reviews the reports, and she sends feedback to the team. This is my normal week.

Hi Carlos, this is Emma with a quick note about our team. We usually start the week with a short meeting. On Tuesdays, the Rwanda team sends the farm checklists, and you verify the numbers. I often review the reports, and I send feedback to everyone. We rarely meet on Fridays, so keep that day for the farm visits. Please attend the alignment call on Wednesday. Thank you, and have a good week.

extra_audio.text: On Mondays, Carlos checks the farm checklists. He verifies supplier compliance. He attends a meeting with the Rwanda team. He reports the results to his manager. His manager reviews the report and sends feedback.
